Standings are updated with the completion of each game.

Teams seeded 7-10 in each conference will compete in a play-in tournament at the end of the regular season.

Glossary

- W : Wins
- L : Losses
- PCT : Winning Percentage
- GB : Games Back
- HOME : Home Record
- AWAY : Away Record
- DIV : Division Record
- CONF : Conference Record
- PPG : Points Per Game
- OPP PPG : Opponent Points Per Game
- DIFF : Average Point Differential
- STRK : Current Streak
- L10 : Record last 10 games
